    • assignables

      public final Map<LocationVariable,Term> assignables
      The name 'assignable' is kept here for legacy reasons. Note that KeY does only verify what can be modified (i.e., what is 'modifiable').

      The name 'assignable' is kept here for legacy reasons. Note that KeY does only verify what can be modified (i.e., what is 'modifiable').
